reasoning: 4x and 8x zoom inspection reveals a medallion-style pixel art sprite with several notable AI tells. (1) GRADIENT SHADING: The center blue sphere uses 4+ distinct blue tones with smooth gradient-like transitions rather than the 2-3 hard tones expected of clean pixel art — classic AI diffusion shading. (2) COLOR BLEED: At the junction where the blue ribbon/bow elements meet the pink-white dithered rings, there is visible color contamination bleeding across boundaries. (3) INCONSISTENT OUTLINES: The ribbon elements at top and bottom show irregular pixel outlining — some edges have 1px borders, others are missing borders entirely, and the ribbon tails trail off in an amorphous pattern suggesting melting detail. (4) SUB-PIXEL SMOOTHING: The outer curved edge of the medallion shows transitional mixed-color pixels characteristic of pre-zoom anti-aliasing applied to a rasterized render rather than clean integer-grid pixel art. (5) The checkered dithering pattern on the rings is mathematically regular (consistent 2x2 block pattern) which is suspicious though not conclusive. Mitigating factors: the overall concept is semantically coherent for a 'scroll_teleport' item, the background is clean with no noise, and the circular ring structure is mostly consistent. The ribbon/bow details are the weakest element and strongly suggest AI generation of what should be a crisp decorative motif.
